title: Add make .git target
body:
Runs gomfmt and gitvalidation

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Why is this named .git? Special significance?

If not, can we get a more clear name? `make validate-branch` or something like that?
ive seen it used on other projects
Whitespace errors in the commit according to gitvalidation

I'm fine with this although there seems to be no users of it, other then Humans
LGTM
@baude could you clean this one up so we can get it off the list.  I think the only thing needed is to move you .phony section to the global section.
